title: Event: Streamline Your Professional Services Operations - 19th of September, Stockholm
excerpt:

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join Omnitas event Streamline Your Professional Services Operations, in partnership with monday.com and Make, in Stockholm on the 19th of September.

This event is exclusively designed for you who want to gain valuable insights into how you can streamline the entire workflow from lead to completed project, using our new business solution PSO.

Learn how the PSO product can manage your entire workflow from lead generation to invoicing, all within monday.com.

Don’t miss this unique opportunity to network, learn, and shape the next wave of business innovation.

When? On the 19th september, at 14:30
Where? Arenavägen 47, 121 77 Johanneshov
What? An exclusive event with networking, inspiring sessions, workshops, live demos and mingling

After the event: As an attendee of our event, you will receive 1 free hour with one of our experts.

A perfect opportunity where we help you transform the inspiration you got from the event into concrete results. Smart, right?

The event will be held in Swedish

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
